title: Anagram, SAM, Trilegal, AZB act on the Mensa Group reverse merger to India
description: After receiving the approval from NCLT, Chandigarh, Mensa Brand Technologies Pte. Ltd. has made a reverse merger into Mensa Brand Technologies Private Limited (operating as BRND.ME), and re-domiciled from Singapore to India.Anagram Partners advised the Mensa Group on this reverse merger and re-domiciliation.The transaction team was led by Simone Reis (Partner) and Rajesh Simhan (Partner), and comprised Rishabh Bhargava (Principal), Anand Unnikrishnan (Principal), Shwetank Chaubey (Partner),
